filter.verified_help: Verified listings have been reviewed by the Realms team for safety and authenticity. Enable this to hide unreviewed submissions.

discover.title: Enhance the experience of your realm's members.
discover.subtitle: Find the extensions, codices, and AI assistants powering Realms.
discover.publish_ext: Be the first to publish an extension.
discover.publish_codex: Be the first to publish a codex.
discover.publish_assistant: Be the first to publish an assistant.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.subtitle: Plug-and-play features that any realm can install via the package manager.

codices.title: Codices
codices.subtitle: Governance frameworks and rule packages for realm types — Dominion, Agora, Syntropia and beyond.

assistants.title: AI Assistants
assistants.subtitle: Realm-hireable AI agents — governance experts, codex auditors, proposal drafters. Realms hire them via a normal governance vote; once approved they run autonomously inside the realm with the role and permissions they declare.

detail.no_namespace: No file_registry namespace attached to this listing.
detail.files_load_error: Could not load files from registry: {error}
detail.perms_intro: When a realm hires this assistant, it asks for the following role and operations. The realm's hire-vote decides whether to grant them.
detail.audit_requested: Audit requested. Smart Social Contracts will review.
detail.delist_confirm: Delist '{id}'? It will be removed from listings and rankings.
detail.how_to_intro_ext: Extensions are installed through your realm's governance system — they are not purchased individually on this page.
detail.how_to_intro_codex: Codices are applied through your realm's governance system — they are not purchased individually on this page.
detail.how_to_intro_assistant: Assistants are hired through your realm's governance system — they are not purchased individually on this page.
detail.how_to_step1: Open your realm and go to Extensions in the administration panel.
detail.how_to_step2: Browse or search for this item by its ID (shown below).
detail.how_to_step4: Once members vote to approve, it activates automatically.

upload.title: Upload
upload.subtitle: Share your extension, codex, or AI assistant with the Realms community. Fill in the details, pick your files, and submit for review.
upload.signin_body: You need to sign in with Internet Identity before you can upload.
upload.signin_note: (Anyone can upload — a developer license is only required to request an audit.)
upload.name: name
upload.price: price (USD cents — display only, no on-chain transfer)
upload.pick_ext: For extensions we expect manifest.json, backend/…, frontend/dist/index.js.
upload.pick_assistant: For assistants we expect prompts (prompts/system.txt), MCP tool manifests (mcp/manifest.json), and eval transcripts (evals/…).
upload.uploading_note: Direct browser → file_registry. Each file uploads in 128 KB chunks.
upload.published_body: Your {kind} is live. Files served from the file_registry canister.
upload.coming_soon_body: Publishing via the web interface is not yet available. If you're a developer, you can use the Realms CLI in the meantime.

purchases.title: My Purchases
purchases.subtitle: Everything you've installed via this marketplace.
purchases.signin: Sign in to view your purchases

developer.title: Developer
developer.subtitle: License status, your published items, and audit requests.
developer.signin_body: Sign in with Internet Identity to manage your listings.
developer.license_grants: License grants you access to the audit flow. Anyone can publish without one.
developer.benefit_1: Get audited and approved by Smart Social Contracts
developer.benefit_2: Show a "Verified" badge on your listings
developer.benefit_3: Surface in the verified-only filters and rankings
developer.billing_note: Powered by the off-chain billing service at {url}. Local dev tip: ask a controller to call grant_manual_license.
developer.billing_unavailable: Billing service unavailable: {error}. If you're running locally, ask a controller to grant a manual license from /admin.
developer.none_ext: You haven't published any extensions yet.
developer.none_codex: You haven't published any codices yet.

admin.title: Admin / Curators
admin.subtitle: Audit queue + manual license grants. Visible only to canister controllers.
admin.not_controller_body: Only canister controllers can access this page.
admin.grant_note: Use this for vouchers, dev environments, or when the off-chain billing service isn't running.
